---
title: "3_DataVisualization"
author: "Denizard"
date: "2025-03-05"
output: html_document
---

######################################### 
#                                       #
#    GMA Project - Data Visualization   #
#                                       # 
######################################### 

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = FALSE)
setwd("~/Desktop/Doutorado UFV/FIT 799 - Pesquisa/Scripts/GMA Scripts")
load("./PhenotypicData.RData")
load("./PlotData.RData")
load("./modelsGLMMs.RData")

df <- df_pheno
par(mfrow=c(1,1))

# packages
library(asreml)
library(igraph)
library(compositions)
library(MASS)
library(lattice)
library(latex2exp)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Raw data visualization

# Principal Component Analysis

```{r}
plot(pcx, type = "screeplot", main = 'Scree plot Main Phenotypic Traits')
# detach("package:compositions", unload = TRUE)
```

# Factor Analysis

```{r}

```

# Irrigation uniformity interpolation

```{r}
postscript("figures/irrig.idw.eps", height = 6, width = 3)  # Width/height in inches
spplot(irrig.idw, zcol = "var1.pred")
dev.off()
spplot(irrig.idw, zcol = "var1.pred")
```

# Correlation of Irrigation Flow and Trait

```{r}
# Define the colors for each generation
colors <- c("yellow", "skyblue", "red", "lightgreen", "hotpink", "purple1")  # Distinct colors
df <- df_pheno

# Iterate over each trait to create plots
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)) {
  # Create the scatter plot with points colored by generation and a single regression line
  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = traits$trait[i], y = "irr_flw"), na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = generation), shape = 23, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm", se = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, name = "Gen") +
    labs(
      x = TeX(traits$name[i]),
      y = TeX("Irrigation Flow ($mm.h^{-1}$)"),
      # title = TeX(paste0("Scatter plot of ", tolower(traits$name[i]), " vs irrigation flow"))
    ) +
    # theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    # scale_x_log10() +
    stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), 
             label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size = 4,
             digits = 3)  # Adjust label.x and label.y as needed
  
  # Print the plot
  suppressWarnings(print(p))
}
```

```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
  xyplot(as.formula(paste("irr_flw ~ ", traits$trait[i])), data = df,
         main = paste("Correlation of Irrigation Flow and ", traits$name[i]),
         group = generation, 
         type = "p",
         alpha = 0.6,
         auto.key = list(space = "right"),  # Add legend automatically
         par.settings = list(superpose.symbol = list(
           pch = c(21, 22, 23, 24, 25),  # Filled symbols: circle, square, diamond, triangle, down-triangle
           col = "black",  # Distinct colors
           # fill = rainbow(length(unique(df$generation)))  # Distinct colors
           fill = c("yellow", "blue", "red", "green", "hotpink", "purple1")  # Distinct colors
           # cex = 1.5   # Increase point size
         ))
         )
}
```

# Box-Cox of trait data

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
  
  boxcox(as.formula(paste0(traits$trait[i], " ~ 1")),
         data = na.omit(df[traits$trait[i]])+0.0001,
         xlab = TeX(paste0("Lambda \\lambda ", traits$name[i]))
         )
}
detach("package:compositions", unload = TRUE)
detach("package:MASS", unload = TRUE)
```

# Boxlot of Means and Std Errors

```{r}
colors <- c("yellow", "skyblue", "red", "lightgreen", "hotpink", "purple1")

for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
# for (i in 4){
  
  fam <-switch(traits$fam[i],
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'sqrt', dispersion = NA)")

  asr <- asremls[[paste0("tom2_", traits$trait[i], ".asr")]]
  
  pred <- summary(asr, coef = TRUE)$coef.fixed +
    summary(asr, coef = TRUE)$coef.fixed["(Intercept)","solution"]
  
  pred <- pred[startsWith(rownames(pred), "geno") &
                 !endsWith(rownames(pred), ":irr_flw"), ]
  
  pred <- data.frame(pred)  |> 
    rownames_to_column("id") |>  # Convert rownames to a column named "id"
    separate(
      col = id,                       # Column to split
      into = c("generation", "ind"),  # New column names
      sep = "-",                      # Split on ":"
      remove = TRUE,
      fill = "right") |>              # Keep original "id" column (set to TRUE to drop it)
    mutate(generation = str_remove(generation, "^geno_")) |> 
    mutate(generation = factor(generation,
                               levels = c("P1","P2","F1","F2","BC1","BC2"))) |> 
    mutate(solution = ifelse(is.na(std.error), NA, solution))

  predseg <- pred |> filter(!is.na(ind))
  predpar <- pred |> filter(is.na(ind)) |> select(-ind)

  res <- data.frame(res = residuals(asr))

  # Perform two left joins and coalesce the results
  df <- df_pheno |>
    select(c(names(df_names), traits$trait[i])) |> 
    left_join(predseg, by = c("generation", "ind")) |>
    left_join(predpar, by = "generation", suffix = c("", "_gen")) |> 
    mutate(solution = coalesce(solution, solution_gen)) |>
    bind_cols(res) |>
    mutate(solution = if_else(
      generation %in% c("P1", "P2", "F1"),
      solution + res,
      solution))
    
  df <- if (traits$fam[i] %in% c(2,4)){
    df |> mutate(solution = exp(solution))
    } else {  df  # no transformation
    }
  
  df <- df |> 
    select(c(names(df_names), traits$trait[i], solution)) |> 
    pivot_longer(c(traits$trait[i], solution)) |> 
    mutate(name = factor(name,
                         levels = c(traits$trait[i], "solution"),
                         labels = c("Original", "Predicted")))

# Basic box plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = generation, y = value, fill = generation, color = name), na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
    # stat_summary(aes(fill = name), fun.y=mean, geom="point", shape=23, size=4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "darkgrey")) +
    labs(
      title = TeX(traits$name[i]),
      color = "Dataset",
      fill = "Generation",
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL
      # y = TeX(traits$name[i])
    ) +
    # theme_minimal() +
    scale_x_discrete(limits=c("BC2","BC1","F2","F1","P2","P1")) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),  # Remove x-axis tick labels
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank()  # Remove x-axis ticks
    ) +
    coord_flip() 

  suppressWarnings(print(p))
}
```

```{r}
# colors <- rainbow(length(levels(df$generation)))  # Generate colors for each group
colors <- c("yellow", "blue", "red", "green", "hotpink", "purple1")  # Generate colors for each group

plot(df$generation, df[[trait]],
     # main = paste0("Boxplot of ", trait, " by generation"),
     main = "",
     xlab = "Genotype",
     ylab = trait)
```

```{r}
# Iterate over each trait to create histograms with normal distribution curves
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)) {
  trait_var <- traits$trait[i]  # Current trait variable name
  trait_name <- traits$name[i]  # Descriptive name for the current trait
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = trait_var)) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..),
                   binwidth = 1, 
                   fill = "lightgray", 
                   color = "white", 
                   na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_density(aes(y = ..density..),
                 color = "blue",
                 lwd = 1,
                 na.rm = TRUE) +
    facet_wrap(~generation, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Distribution of", trait_name, "by Generation"),
      x = trait_name,
      y = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  # Display the plot
  print(p)
}
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
    
  # Calculate densities and find max density for ylim adjustment
  densities <- lapply(split(df[[traits$trait[i]]], df$generation), density, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_density <- max(sapply(densities, function(d) max(d$y)))
  
  # Create an empty histogram with adjusted ylim
  
  hist(df[[traits$trait[i]]], 
       # main = paste0("Normal fit of ", tolower(traits$name[i]), " by generation"), 
       # xlab = traits$name[i], 
       main = "",
       xlab = "",
       ylab = "Density", 
       freq = FALSE,             # Plot density instead of counts
       col = "lightgray",        # Light background for clarity
       border = "white",         # Remove bar borders
       ylim = c(0, max_density + 0.025))  # Set ylim based on max density
  
  # Add legend
  # legend("topright", legend = levels(df$generation), col = colors, lwd = 2, title = "Generation")
  
  # Add normal distribution fit lines
  mean_val <- mean(df[[traits$trait[i]]], na.rm = TRUE)    # Mean of the group
  sd_val <- sd(df[[traits$trait[i]]], na.rm = TRUE)        # Standard deviation of the group
  
  curve(dnorm(x, mean = mean_val, sd = sd_val),  # Normal curve
        lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
  
  for (j in levels(df$generation)) {
    group_data <- df[[traits$trait[i]]][df$generation == j]
    mean_val <- mean(group_data, na.rm = TRUE)    # Mean of the group
    sd_val <- sd(group_data, na.rm = TRUE)        # Standard deviation of the group
    
    curve(dnorm(x, mean = mean_val, sd = sd_val),  # Normal curve
          col = colors[which(levels(df$generation) == j)],
          lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Add legend
  legend("topright", legend = levels(df$generation), col = colors, lwd = 2, title = "Generation")
}
```

##ASReml Outputs

#Residuals Model

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
# for (i in 13){
  abrv <- traits$abrv[i]
  t <- traits$trait[i]
  f <- traits$fam[i]
  j <- traits$mod[i]
  
  # pdf(paste0("figures/res_", abrv,".pdf"))
  postscript(paste0("figures/residual_", t, ".eps"), width = 6, height = 6)
  # for(j in 1:length(mods)){
    asr <- paste(abrv, f, sprintf("%02d",j), "tom.asr", sep = "_")
  
    asrfam <-switch(traits$fam[i],
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'sqrt', dispersion = NA)")
    
    tryCatch({
    plot(asremls[[asr]]$model)
        }, error = function(e) {
          message("Error at trait ", t, ", model ", j, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
          })
  # }
  dev.off()
}
# plot(asremls[[asr]]$model)
```

#Variograms

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(traits)){
# for (i in 13){
  abrv <- traits$abrv[i]
  t <- traits$trait[i]
  f <- traits$fam[i]
  j <- traits$mod[i]
  
  # pdf(paste0("figures/varioG_", abrv,".pdf"))
  postscript(paste0("figures/vario_", t, ".eps"), width = 6, height = 6)
  # for(j in 1:length(mods)){
  # for(j in 2){
    asr <- paste(abrv, f, sprintf("%02d",j), "tom.asr", sep = "_")
    
    asrfam <-switch(traits$fam[i],
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_gaussian(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'identity', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'log', dispersion = NA)",
             "asr_poisson(link = 'sqrt', dispersion = NA)")
    tryCatch({
    vario <- varioGram(asremls[[asr]]$model)
    colnames(vario)[1:2] <- c("Line", "Plant N°")
    plot(vario)
        }, error = function(e) {
          message("Error at trait ", t, ", model ", j, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
          })
  # }
  dev.off()
} 
# plot(vario)
```
